The following events took place in '''3670 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*End of the [[Kanz Disorders/Legends|Kanz Disorders]].<ref name="TEA134" />
*The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] freed the [[Lorrdian/Legends|Lorrdians]] from [[Argazdan/Legends|Argazdan]] control.<ref name="TEA134" />
*The [[Mirialan/Legends|Mirialan]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Hylo Visz]] purchases her [[Starship/Legends|starship]], the ''[[Crimson Fleece]]''. {{Circa}}<ref name="Smug">{{SWArchive|url=games/videgames/tor_smugglersvanguard/index.html|text=''The Old Republic: Smuggler's Vanguard''|int=The Old Republic: Smuggler's Vanguard}}</ref>
